data.description:
Expose `verify_completion` on CLI + MCP, mirroring the `review` op so the CLI/MCP coverage guards pass.

## Scope (files)
- `src/rebar/_cli/__init__.py`: `rebar verify-completion <id> [--graph] [-o json|text] [--check]`; intercept in `main()`; **no pinned help `.txt`** (mirror review — avoids the live-driving CLI coverage guard, BL-4); `LLMError`→`Error:`+exit 1.
- `src/rebar/mcp_server.py`: `verify_completion(ticket_id, graph=False)` tool gated by `_allow_llm()`; plain dict, no advertised outputSchema; add to `NO_SCHEMA_EXEMPT` in the MCP coverage guard (BL-4).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `rebar verify-completion --check` exits 0; text + json output render verdict/findings
- [ ] MCP tool gated by `REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_LLM`; absent → clean typed error
- [ ] MCP coverage guard passes (`verify_completion` in `NO_SCHEMA_EXEMPT`); CLI coverage guard unaffected (no help arm)
- [ ] optionality matrix extended: `completion` in discovery tuple, `verify_completion` in OPERATIONS + per-interface degradation
data.title: WS-3: CLI + MCP surfaces for verify_completion
